{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320164841E2D184936E7CB5233F42"}"},"total":8522},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7532925666440528665","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以称为《仙尊还没穿越蛊界在地球的日子》，小学之前CS程度跟仙尊有的一比，不过刻画的很到位，很符合那个时代部分小孩子的心性，后面性格开始渐渐转变，属于脑子非常灵活，敢打敢拼，有底线的坏人。CS的地方恨得人牙痒痒，但有些时候又不得不佩服他的人格魅力，不完美但实实在在的人。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753915128,"group_id":"7447483917440928793","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一介小白，诸君多多指教","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7VQjCWWHA8v+Op9E9CsRghKhX1x+uFx0gxqHFpyrTKM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/36e1c3b3d48a471c9b0101c02b73e59e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533539&x-signature=1JHi63cZdrj83W7tQbU2hA5uyoc%3D","user_id":"2541718122560567","user_name":"偷走你的心肝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2541718122560567","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7447483917440928793","book_info":{"abstract":"（青春，校园，成长，日常，救赎。）
第一人称，讲述坏男孩，与同校师生斗智斗勇，相互救赎，逐渐成长的青春故事。

我叫方圆，从小我就和别人家的孩子不一样，异性说我是木头疙瘩，朋友说我自私自利。

然而，我并没有觉得这有什么不妥。
